name: eWAY Credit Card Payment Method
body:

"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000OQWeLMAX.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000OQWeLMAX.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "eWay1.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the Mastercard Visa + more tile, and choose "}, {"text": "eWay Rapid", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the drop down menu that appears."}, {"text": "
"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000OQeloMAD.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000OQeloMAD.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "eWay2.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": " "}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Visa", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Mastercard,", "bold": true}, {"text": " and any other card types you have access to with your eWay agreement. You can also choose to allow "}, {"text": "Saved Cards", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "
"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000OQeqFMAT.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000OQeqFMAT.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "eWay3.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": " "}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your "}, {"text": "eWAY Rapid Secure Panel Public API Key ", "bold": true}, {"text": "(called the "}, {"text": "Pay Now Button Public API Key", "bold": true}, {"text": " in eWAY), "}, {"text": "eWAY Rapid API Key", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "eWAY Rapid API User Password", "bold": true}, {"text": " which is the information provided by eWAY.  "}, {"text": "
"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000OQeU5MAL.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000OQeU5MAL.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "eWay4.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": eWAY will send you instructions on creating a user. This user's password is required in the above field."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Refer to our "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1036-payment-method-settings", "children": [{"text": "Payment Method Settings"}]}, {"text": " guide for reference on how to set up functions like minimum spend and surcharges."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": " button at the bottom to finish the setup of eWAY Rapid."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
